title: Some Overhaul
description: Vanilla-friendly modpack focused on performance, increased difficulty, and shader + texturepack support
body:
![Some Overhaul Titlescreen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/670cd6cbe655a5ecd2acdddef8dc60b3ccd37da3.webp)

# 2.0.0
Some overhaul just got re-Overhauled! It got turned from kitchen-sink to vanilla+ with a focus on multiplayer and texture pack support. By default it now uses Patrix among other 32x fixes to create a new way to play minecraft. It's pretty, it's performative, It's... Difficult.

Features:
* A stable collection of mods that enhance your experience
* Mods are focused around vanilla+ and try to add as little blocks as possible while still creating new opportunities for the player.
* Share your worlds with E4mc and talk to others with Simple Voice Chat.
* Custom datapack and resourcepack to neatly tie things together
* Mobs will be attracted to your scent, and will get stronger the further you travel from spawn.
